query:
-- ดู contract status ที่มีใน DB
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM contracts
WHERE section = 'ff365'
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

-- ดู transactions ของ contracts ที่ status = Closed/Completed
SELECT pt.external_id, pt.contract_no, pt.paid_at, pt.amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid')) as principal_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid')) as interest_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount')) as close_amount,
  c.status as contract_status,
  c.close_date
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON pt.contract_no = c.contract_no AND pt.section = c.section
WHERE pt.section = 'ff365'
  AND c.status IN ('Closed', 'Completed', 'ปิดยอด', 'close', 'closed', 'completed')
LIMIT 5;
